yt_title: Marc Lore on E-commerce, Timberwolves, and Building Multi-billion Dollar Companies

business_ideas.idea: Conversational commerce: text/voice AI shopping with hyper-personalization
Virtual fitting technology using AI to predict how clothes fit without trying
Home health diagnostics dashboard tracking daily metrics and risks
Mobile kitchens bringing restaurant food to customers via trucks
Sports gambling and player stock market trading

predictions.text: Conversational commerce will replace search as primary shopping method
Home health monitoring will become as common as brushing teeth
Major companies will consolidate around simple, boring business models
